title: Weight Loss Snacks
description: Snacks that actually support weight loss — lower-sugar, higher-protein, lower-calorie options reviewed honestly against the candy and chips they replace.
intro: There's no magic weight-loss snack — but there are smarter swaps. We focus on per-calorie satiety, sugar load, and how each option compares to a typical candy bar or sugary drink. The right snack helps you stay full; the wrong one quietly eats your daily calorie budget.

sections.title: Better-Than-Candy Bars
sections.description: Bars that beat their candy alternatives on sugar and protein, even if they're not perfect.

sections.title: Lower-Sugar Drink Swaps
sections.description: If you replace one sugary drink a day, you change your daily sugar intake more than any snack swap.

sections.title: Lighter Snack Choices
sections.description: Lower-calorie packaged snacks that won't leave you hungry an hour later.
